headline: Walmart bets big on remodeled stores

headline: Yum! Brands CEO on innovation & Pizza Hut's future
summary: Yum! Brands CEO, Chris Turner, chats with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about his big plans for Taco Bell, what the future holds for KFC in the US, and why Pizza Hut may be sold soon.Plus, The Coffee Can Investor Author, Neeraj Khemlani, and portfolio manager, Matt Ankrum, talk about the future of investing and their outlook for the news business amid considerable industrywide cost-cutting.

content.title: Yum! Brands CEO on innovation & Pizza Hut's future
content.description:
Yum! Brands CEO, Chris Turner, chats with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about his big plans for Taco Bell, what the future holds for KFC in the US, and why Pizza Hut may be sold soon.

Plus, The Coffee Can Investor Author, Neeraj Khemlani, and portfolio manager, Matt Ankrum, talk about the future of investing and their outlook for the news business amid considerable industrywide cost-cutting.
content.summary: Yum! Brands CEO, Chris Turner, chats with Yahoo Finance Executive Editor Brian Sozzi about his big plans for Taco Bell, what the future holds for KFC in the US, and why Pizza Hut may be sold soon.Plus, The Coffee Can Investor Author, Neeraj Khemlani, and portfolio manager, Matt Ankrum, talk about the future of investing and their outlook for the news business amid considerable industrywide cost-cutting.

headline: Why Walmart is rolling out AI to 2M employees

headline: One Year Later: We Predicted Visa Would Overtake Walmart. Here’s Where That Stands.
summary: On April 14, 2025, we argued that Visa (NYSE: V) would overtake Walmart (NYSE: WMT) in market cap within five years. Both have now reported full fiscal years, with Visa’s Q1 FY2026 landing on January 29, 2026, while Walmart posted FY26 on February 19, 2026. Turns out, the gap widened. The One-Year Scoreboard Isn’t Close ... One Year Later: We Predicted Visa Would Overtake Walmart. Here’s Where That Stands.

headline: Sam’s Club rolls out 1-hour express delivery option

headline: Walmart Releases 2026 Annual Report and Proxy Statement
summary: BENTONVILLE, Ark., April 23, 2026--Walmart Inc. (Nasdaq: WMT) issued its 2026 Annual Report and filed its Proxy Statement today in preparation for the company’s Annual Shareholders’ Meeting on Thursday, June 4, 2026.

headline: Target helps fill gap left by shuttered competitor
summary: For years, Target had a certain reputation. It was a store you could walk into expecting a fun, engaging shopping experience. headline: Tax Refunds Are Here. Retail Stocks to Watch as People Sort Out Whether to Spend on Gas or Goodies.
summary: FEATURE  Man plans, god laughs. Retail investors are learning that lesson all over again. Just a few months ago, 2026 looked like it was going to be consumers’ time to shine: Tax changes meant bigger refunds were teed up, while policy watchers were hoping for potential interest-rate cuts and tariff relief.
